content.title: Understanding Flood Risk in Kuching
content.body: Kuching faces annual flooding due to its geography and proximity to major rivers. This article explores the key risk factors, historical patterns, and what residents can do to prepare.

content.title: Flood Safety Tips for Families
content.body: When flood warnings are issued, knowing what to do can save lives. Here are essential safety tips every family in flood-prone areas should know.

content.title: IoT Sensors: How FloodWatch Monitors Water Levels
content.body: Our network of IoT sensors provides real-time water level readings from rivers across Sabah. Learn how the technology works and how it helps keep communities safe.
